title: Origins: Dragon Warrior
description: In the Heavenly Court, the Dragon King bestowed upon you the title of [Dragon Warrior] and granted you the authority to use the power of [Dragon Fist].
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in the newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge versions, there may be bugs that are not expected.

# Dragon Warrior

**In the Heavenly Court, the Dragon King bestowed upon you the title of [Dragon Warrior] and granted you the authority to use the power of [Dragon Fist].**

## Dragon Treasury
### By the Dragon Power, You gain power from your Treasures.
> Using **[Primary Active]**, You can open a five slot inventory, Each Slot with item in **[Dragon Treasury]** will add 1 Attack Damage. Each Uniqe Enchantment on item will add 1 Attack Damage when you holding nothing.
## Dragon Fist
### By the Dragon Power, You lost the ability of long range attack, But it seems like You love the flexibility of Fist fighting.
> When you holding nothing, you recieve 10% speed, increase 20% when sprinting. When you holding anything, you lost your all Attack Damage. You always deal no damage using projectile.

> You need to wait for 5 seconds to able to attack. (in 1.20.1, you will only having attack damage from **[Dragon Treasury]**)

> Due to your humility, You won't pickup item for 5 seconds after attacked anyone. (Not work on 1.20.1)
## Dragon Mark
### By the Dragon Power, You have incredible close-gap mobility.
> When **[Dragon Fist]** is active, Your Attack will Mark target. When you use **[Jump]** in mid-air, you will dash to your nearest **[Dragon Mark]** target. If there's is no target in 10 block range, you will dash up. The **[Dragon Mark]** will remove after 5 seconds. Consume Hunger, if you have no hunger then Consume Health.

> Target with **[Dragon Mark]** will glow.

> You take no fall damage.
## Be water
### You remember how you live your life before. Be water, my friend.
> Using **[Secondary Active]**, You can switch between Steam, Water, Ice mode.

> Steam: Increase 10% speed.

> Water: Increase 10% attack damage.

> Ice: Receive 4 defense points.
## Dragon Dance
### By the Dragon Power, Your kicking having strong Crowd control.
> When **[Dragon Fist]** is active, Using **[Use]** On Ground will knock-up entity marked by **[Dragon Mark]** in 5 blocks. Consume Hunger, if you have no hunger then Consume Health.

> When **[Dragon Fist]** is active, Using **[Use]** in mid-air will knock-back and dealing 6 damage to entity marked by **[Dragon Mark]** in 5 blocks. Consume Hunger, if you have no hunger then Consume Health.

- Any question can ask in the discord server ::: )
